reasons: Highest LOC in the JDBC module
Manual SQL assembly with multi-table joins
loadPetsAndVisits — nested result-set mapping, imperative loop logic
Cross-cutting: touches owners, pets, visits, and pet_types tables in a single query
Profile-guarded — changes here do NOT affect the default jpa profile
Highest LOC in the web layer
Multi-method handler: create, find, update, show, REST visits endpoint
Modified file (git status shows M) — active churn
Contains REST JSON endpoint (getOwnerVisits) alongside JSP-backed methods
Single service class for ALL domain operations — God-service pattern
@Cacheable on findVets — cache invalidation risk if vet data changes
@Transactional at class level — all methods are transactional regardless of need
Complex JDBC pet-type and pet INSERT/UPDATE logic
Manages SimpleJdbcInsert instances for two tables
Generic abstract ResultSetExtractor for one-to-many JDBC result mapping

global_risk_signals: No TTL on Caffeine cache — vets cache never expires in the default configuration
XML-based Spring config — bean wiring errors surface at runtime, not compile time
Three interchangeable repository implementations — parity bugs are possible across profiles
OwnerController currently has an open modification (git status M) — review before merging
